pages.purpose: Bot list, open/closed positions summary, account value chart, profit metrics. v2.164.6: account-value totals come from useAccountValueSummary (fast /account-value-summary endpoint) instead of the full portfolio fetch, and AccountValueChart + MarketSentimentCards are code-split via React.lazy/Suspense to shrink the initial Dashboard bundle. v2.164.8: non-critical queries (reservations, transfer summary, PropGuard status, per-bot stats) are deferred for ~2s after first paint; open/closed position summary queries now pass account_id to the backend and stop polling in hidden tabs. v2.164.9: bot list fetches now also pass account_id server-side instead of fetching cross-account bots and filtering in the browser. v2.165.0 renders SpeculativeBucketCard (bucket size, utilization, remaining capacity) when the selected account has speculative_allocation_pct > 0.
Create, edit, delete, and manage trading bots with strategy configuration

Open positions with real-time P&L, limit close, edit settings, add funds; supports grouping by category (renders group headers), client-side pagination (page size 10 or 100, prev/next controls, total filtered count), and category filter; Panic Sell button visible in top-right header when canWritePositions && openPositions > 0 && selectedAccount, opens PanicSellModal; inline slippage override confirm dialog shown when manual force-close returns slippageBlocked:true — state: showSlippageOverride, slippageOverrideWarning, slippageOverridePositionId; handler handleSlippageOverrideConfirm re-invokes force-close with override flag. v2.164.10: secondary summary widgets now refresh every 2 minutes instead of every minute, while the main open-deals feed remains adaptive. v2.166.16: open-positions list is virtualized via VirtualizedPositionList (@tanstack/react-virtual, window scrolling, dynamic row measurement) so only visible PositionCards render at the 100-per-page setting; LightweightChartModal and DealChart (inside PositionCard) are code-split via React.lazy so the chart library loads only when a chart is opened. Adds a 3-way view-mode toggle (Table / Cards / Grid) driven by usePositionFilters viewMode; Grid mode tiles PositionCards responsively at 1/2/3 columns (breakpoints resolved via useMediaQuery) using buildVisualRows from pages/positions/utils/visualRows.ts.

Closed and failed positions with trade history, AI logs, statistics. Uses shared useMarketPrice(BTC-USD) for BTC conversion display, scopes closed-position fetches by selected account_id server-side, and now scopes supporting bot-list fetches by account as well. v2.164.10: only the visible tab's backing query polls, so the page no longer refreshes closed positions and failed orders in parallel.

All crypto holdings, balances by asset, sell coins, allocation charts; always fetches with force_fresh=true (bypasses backend cache); listens for portfolio:trade-completed DOM event (dispatched by NotificationContext on order fills) to trigger immediate refresh; 60-second polling interval; Holdings table has Hide Dust toggle: state hideDust (boolean, default true, persisted to localStorage key 'portfolio:hideDust'); dustCount useMemo counts holdings with usd_value < $1; sortedHoldings filters out dust rows when hideDust=true; toggle button label shows 'Dust hidden (N)' or 'Show all'; empty state message mentions dust when hideDust=true v2.166.16: the per-asset candlestick chart modal is extracted to pages/portfolio/PortfolioChartModal.tsx and loaded via React.lazy, so lightweight-charts is fetched only when a chart is opened and the holdings table renders without it.
Aggregated news, video player, article reader with TTS, sentiment cards

Technical analysis with multiple indicators, timeframes, chart types v2.166.16: useChartManagement/useIndicators import lightweight-charts lazily through utils/chartLib.loadChartLib(); useChartManagement exposes chartReady, which gates the series/data effects (the chart is now created asynchronously).

User settings, password, accounts, AI credentials, blacklist config. v2.165.0 renders SpeculativeAllocationSection for the per-account speculative bucket cap (0-50%) and adds a mount-time effect that detects ?dismiss_token=&account_id= on the URL (deep link from the calibration alert email) and POSTs to speculativeBucketApi.dismissCalibrationAlert to stamp the 30-day cooldown. v2.166.0 extends the same mount-time effect to also recognize ?apply_token=&account_id=&proposal_id= URLs (the one-click apply link from the calibration alert email) and POSTs to speculativeBucketApi.applyWeightsProposal, and renders <SpeculativeWeightsHistory accountId={a.id}/> inside the Speculative Bucket card below each account's allocation section.

Financial goals with progress tracking and trend charts, report schedules, generated report history; goal cards show separate expense and savings-target item counts; 'Manage Items' button opens ExpenseItemsEditor. Report schedule cards now include a pause/resume toggle button (sets ReportSchedule.is_active) so users can suspend delivery without deleting the schedule.
Admin management page with tabs for users, groups, and roles (RBAC administration)

bot_management.purpose: DCA budget configuration form. v2.167.10: uses the shared calculateSoftCeiling helper from botUtils.ts instead of an inline copy. Accepts backendEffectiveCeiling?: number | null (backend's authoritative Bot.soft_ceiling_effective_max) as a fallback display value. v3.11.0: adds a 'Grace Safety Orders' numeric input (grace_safety_orders strategy param, default 0) that lets users specify extra DCA layers beyond max_safety_orders without permanently raising the bot's configured maximum.

Complex trading condition builder with logic gates. v2.165.0: RiskPreset union and RISK_PRESETS catalog gain 'speculative' so the UI can offer the high-risk doubling preset alongside the existing conservative/balanced/aggressive options.
Simple condition builder for strategy parameters

Modal form for creating/editing bots; v2.165.0 renders SpeculativePresetPanel when the selected risk preset is 'speculative' so users see the catalyst-trade target multiple, horizon, and max-hold-hours fields inline. v2.167.10: passes backendEffectiveCeiling={editingBot.soft_ceiling_effective_max} down through StrategyConfigSection to DCABudgetConfigForm.

Bot-form panel for the 'speculative' risk preset: exposes target_multiple, target_horizon_hours, and speculative_max_hold_hours inputs plus an explanatory summary of the catalyst-trade workflow. Added in v2.165.0.
Coin category badge display and category-based pair selection for bot forms

Strategy parameter configuration section within bot form (DCA budget, phase conditions, strategy params); generic dropdown renderer displays empty-string options as '(provider default)' (used by the ai_spot_opinion ai_model_override param). v2.167.10: threads backendEffectiveCeiling down to DCABudgetConfigForm.
Bot card component for bot list. v2.167.10: reads the typed bot.soft_ceiling_effective_max field directly (dropped the previous as any cast).
Pre-configured sample bot templates for quick setup

position_management.purpose: Edit TP, SL, trailing TP, max safety orders
Add funds to existing positions. v2.167.9: the aggregate-value query is scoped to position.account_id so the budget calculation reflects only the owning account.
Set limit close orders with price target
Slippage impact warning before market close

Multi-step emergency liquidation wizard: configure (action, target currency, options checkboxes) → confirm (typed CONFIRM gate) → mfa (TOTP or email OTP input) → progress (live phase indicators polled via useQuery refetchInterval:1500ms) → done (completion summary); PHASES order matches backend: stopping_bots → stopping_rebalancers → closing_positions → converting → completed; 14 tests in PanicSellModal.test.tsx
View logs, trades, AI decisions for a position
Filter controls for positions: bot, status, search, sort, category filter dropdown, group-by selector; 5-column grid layout

Individual position display with P&L and actions; closed deals expose durable exit provenance (manual/automatic source, trigger, process role, hostname, and exchange order ID). Renders AIReasoningExpander and accepts optional forceCardLayout?: boolean for tiled grid view.

Collapsible AI reasoning panel for a position: prefetches positionsApi.getAIOpinion(id), self-hides when tool_calls is empty/null, shows signal/confidence/reasoning plus per-tool expandable output summaries; exported from pages/positions/components/index.ts. v2.165.0 also renders SpeculativeSignalBreakdown when the AI opinion row has doubling_probability_score or speculative_components populated.

Per-position catalyst-signal breakdown shown inside AIReasoningExpander: displays the AI's doubling_probability_score, the deterministic speculative_score, and a table of the 6 weighted component scores (momentum, volume, volatility expansion, catalysts, relative strength, structural breakout) pulled from AIOpinionLog.speculative_components. Added in v2.165.0.

v2.166.16: windowed list for position rows using @tanstack/react-virtual useWindowVirtualizer; dynamic measurement via measureElement (rows vary: expanded cards, group headers); generic over row type with renderItem render prop

charts.purpose: Lightweight price chart for position entry/exit
Full-featured chart modal with indicators and oscillators

Account value over time line chart with activity markers (trade wins/losses, deposits, withdrawals) on BTC/USD series. Refactored: series-building logic extracted to the pure helper buildAccountValueSeries() in accountValueChartData.ts; component now imports that helper, keeping the chart component free of data-transform logic.

Pure data-transform module for AccountValueChart. Exports buildAccountValueSeries(snapshots, activity) which converts raw AccountValueSnapshot rows and daily activity markers into the lightweight-charts line-series format with annotated markers. No React, no side effects — unit-testable in isolation.
P&L bar/line chart by time period

v2.166.16: per-asset candlestick+volume chart modal extracted from Portfolio.tsx; statically imports lightweight-charts but is itself loaded via React.lazy so the library stays out of the Portfolio chunk

logs_and_analysis.purpose: AI bot decision logs with filtering
Scanner logs for pair scanning decisions

news_and_media.purpose: Full-screen modal for article preview with reader mode and TTS
Articles tab: Read All controls, category/source filters, article grid, pagination
Seen/unseen filter pills, full-articles-only toggle, bulk mark buttons for articles and videos
Videos tab: category/source filters, Play All controls, video grid, pagination

market_sentiment_cards.purpose: Card grid container for all sentiment indicators
Info tooltip component for card descriptions

reports.purpose: Create/edit financial goal modal; v3.13.23 exposes Tracking Start while editing existing goals so progress tracking can be reset without recreating the goal.
Visual progress bar for individual goal completion
Recharts ComposedChart showing actual vs ideal goal progress over time with on-track status
Modal for viewing generated report details

Expense items CRUD editor for expenses-type goals; supports item_type toggle (Expense | Savings Target); savings-target form shows target amount, target date, current balance, assumed growth rate, and recurring toggle; savings items display with green piggy-bank badge and progress percentage. Split in Phase 5 (1338 -> 1041 LOC) — renders SortableExpenseRow per item and imports frequency/due-date helpers from ExpenseItemsEditor.helpers.ts.

Sortable expense/savings row used by ExpenseItemsEditor: drag handle (@dnd-kit), move-to-top/bottom + jump-to-position controls, edit/delete actions, savings piggy-bank badge. Extracted from ExpenseItemsEditor.tsx in Phase 5.
Shared helpers for ExpenseItemsEditor and SortableExpenseRow: FREQUENCY_PILLS, FREQ_LABELS, due-date formatting (formatDueBadge). Extracted in Phase 5.

prop_firm.purpose: PropGuard drawdown monitoring dashboard for prop firm accounts

auth_and_security.purpose: Prompt to enable MFA for security
Visual password strength indicator; also exports CapsLockWarning component (renders amber caps-lock hint when active prop is true, returns null otherwise)
Full-screen notice shown when session limits are active, requiring user acknowledgment
Auto-login component for demo accounts via URL shortcut (/demo_usd, /demo_btc, /demo_both)

account_and_settings.purpose: Settings panel showing AI usage and cost over a selectable day window (7/30/90); total cards for calls/tokens/cost, plus per-provider and per-model tables; calls aiCostApi.getSummary(days); rendered in Settings.tsx adjacent to AIProvidersManager

Dashboard card showing the per-account speculative bucket snapshot: bucket size (USD), used (sum of open speculative-position cost basis), remaining, utilization %, and count of open speculative positions. Fetches from speculativeBucketApi.get(accountId); self-hides when speculative_allocation_pct is 0. Added in v2.165.0.

Settings panel for the per-account speculative bucket cap (0-50%): slider + numeric input with a recommended-allocation hint. Persists speculative_allocation_pct via the accounts update endpoint and invalidates the bucket snapshot query on save. Added in v2.165.0.

Read-only collapsed table of past SpeculativeWeightsProposal rows per account (v2.166.0). Fetches via speculativeBucketApi.listWeightsProposals(accountId); renders status badges (applied / pending / superseded / reverted / rejected) with distinct colors and a summary of the before/after weight deltas. Self-hides when the account has no proposal history. Paired test file SpeculativeWeightsHistory.test.tsx covers the render paths with vitest.

Sticky read-only banner displayed when the active account is a shared account observed by the current user; shows the owner's display name and account name, e.g. 'Observer Mode — Viewing Louis's account Main Trading (Read-Only)'; receives ownerName from App.tsx via selectedAccount.shared_by

Settings panel listing other active sessions for the current user with multi-select terminate and 'Terminate all' action; uses useOtherSessions/useTerminateSessions/useTerminateAllOtherSessions from hooks/useSessions. Extracted from Settings.tsx in Phase 5.
Settings field for superusers to set/update their display name; inline save with validation. Extracted from Settings.tsx in Phase 5.
Shared utilities for settings components: parseDevice(ua) returns browser+OS from a user-agent string; timeAgo(dateStr) returns a relative-time label. Extracted from Settings.tsx in Phase 5.

Shared types and cache helpers for PortfolioManagement: CurrencySlider type, PortfolioCache types, mode constants, sessionStorage cache read/write helpers. Extracted from PortfolioManagement.tsx in Phase 5 (1228 to 1161 LOC).

Pure helpers for DCABudgetConfigForm: safeParseFloat/safeParseInt, numericProps input-constraint builder, DCA ladder calculation, condition normalization. Extracted in Phase 5 (DCABudgetConfigForm.tsx shrunk 1238 to 1062 LOC).

layout_and_common.purpose: Toast notifications for order fills and alerts
Terms acceptance modal on first login

bots.purpose: BotFormData type, defaults, parameter validation, pair conversion. calculateSoftCeiling(...) returns number | null: null when the soft ceiling is not computable (worstCaseMin × multiplier <= 0, e.g. the worst-case exchange minimum has not loaded yet) instead of dividing by zero; callers must treat null as 'unknown'.

news.purpose: Lightweight markdown renderer for article content display

positions.purpose: Buy/sell history visualization within position; safety order price lines rendered via createPriceLine O(d) instead of addLineSeries+setData O(d×n); tracks active lines in soPriceLinesRef; imports LineStyle from lightweight-charts. v3.11.0: draws grace SO trigger lines and markers in amber to distinguish them from standard safety order levels.
Price bar with entry/exit levels; DCA price calculation delegated to calculateDCAPrices() in positionUtils.ts (replaces former O(d²) nested loop)

Position calculation and formatting utilities; exports calculateDCAPrices(completedDCAs, maxDCAOrders, priceDeviation, stepScale, referencePrice) using an O(d) closed-form formula. v2.168.13 adds three exports that are the single source of truth for quote-currency price precision: STABLE_QUOTE_CURRENCIES (string array: USD, USDT, USDC), getQuotePrecision(quoteCurrency) (2 for stables, 8 for crypto), and formatPriceForQuote(price, quoteCurrency) (bare decimal string at the correct precision). Consumed by SlippageWarningModal, LimitCloseModal, and DepthChart.

frontend/src/components/account/rebalanc.name: rebalancerMath
frontend/src/components/account/rebalanc.description: Pure allocation logic for Bot Budget Rebalancer slider redistribution

contexts.purpose: User authentication, JWT token management, session state

Multi-account state (CEX/DEX), account switching. v2.165.0: AccountData and AccountResponse types gain speculative_allocation_pct so the Dashboard card, Settings panel, and bot form can read the per-account speculative cap.
White-label branding configuration (app name, logo, colors)

WebSocket order fill notifications, toast alerts, and audio. Before connecting it refreshes expired auth tokens and skips the socket if no valid session remains. Handles speculative calibration alerts and surfaces a persistent warning when an automatic exit is reported from an unexpected process or host.
Persistent video player state across page navigation
Persistent article reader with TTS playback
Styled async confirm dialog replacing native window.confirm(); useConfirm() returns a promise-based function accepting title, message, labels, and variant (danger/warning/default)
Coordinate media playback (pause video when reading, vice versa)

global.purpose: Detects CapsLock state via window keydown/keyup events using e.getModifierState('CapsLock'); returns boolean

SSR/test-safe responsive media-query subscription: useMediaQuery(query: string) -> boolean; attaches a MediaQueryList change listener and returns a live boolean that matches the current viewport against the CSS media-query string. Used by Positions.tsx to determine the deals-grid column count.
Web Audio API for order fill notification sounds
Fetch market indicators and determine current season
Session management: useOtherSessions() lists active sessions, useTerminateSessions() terminates them; moved from pages/games/hooks/ to shared hooks/

Fast account value summary for the dashboard/header: React Query against accountValueSummaryApi.get(accountId) keyed by account id, staleTime 30s, 60s refetchInterval, keepPreviousData across account switches; when the backend returns is_stale or is_refreshing the hook schedules a single setTimeout refetch 5s later so the cached snapshot upgrades to live totals without polling tightly. Introduced in v2.164.6.

Shared market-price hook for product endpoints such as BTC-USD and ETH-USD: React Query against marketDataApi.getPrice(productId) keyed by productId with common polling/staleness policy so header/pages reuse one fetch path. Introduced in v2.164.8.

Single shared portfolio query keyed by ['account-portfolio', accountId]: Portfolio/Bots/Charts pages previously ran three separate 60s polls with mismatched keys and endpoints. The Portfolio page passes { live: true } for a force_fresh (backend cache bypass) flavor under an isolated cache key. Introduced in v2.166.12.

bots.purpose: Bot form state management: form data, validation, coin categories, pair selection
Fetch bots, strategies, trading pairs, portfolio. v2.167.9: the aggregate-value query is keyed and scoped to selectedAccount.id so each account gets its own isolated cache entry.
Bot config validation, budget sizing, parameters

charts.purpose: Fetch OHLCV data for multiple pairs/timeframes

positions.purpose: Filter and search positions; manages category filter, groupBy state, client-side pagination (pageSize 10/100, currentPage), and uniqueCategories computed dynamically from position data. Also manages viewMode ('table' | 'list' | 'grid') + setViewMode, persisted to localStorage key zenith-positions-view-mode; exports the DealsViewMode type.

Close, add funds, update settings, save notes; when force-close response contains requires_confirmation:true, returns {success:false, slippageBlocked:true, slippageWarning} instead of showing an error toast — caller (Positions.tsx) handles this by showing the inline slippage override confirm dialog
Fetch and cache trades for positions

Fetch positions, bots, prices, calculate P&L. Scopes open positions and bot lists by selected account_id, reads BTC-USD from shared useMarketPrice(), deduplicates product IDs before /prices/batch requests, and skips polling while the document is hidden. v2.164.10: batch prices are fetched through React Query instead of a manual timer, open-position polling backs off from 5s to 30s when there are no active deals, and bot metadata uses a long stale window instead of a hot polling loop.

news.purpose: Fetch and cache article content by URL
Fetch news and video articles with caching
Filter news by source, date, category
Text-to-speech with word timing, voice cycling, rate control
Track and query user seen/unseen status for content

api_layer.base_url: Configured via VITE_API_URL env var, defaults to same origin
api_layer.auth: Authorization: Bearer {token} header via Axios interceptor

modules.name: authFetch
modules.purpose: Fetch wrapper with auth token injection

modules.name: dashboardApi
modules.purpose: Dashboard statistics

modules.name: positionsApi
modules.purpose: Position CRUD, trades, AI logs, settings, budget resize; getAll default limit raised to 500; panicSellSendMfa(), panicSell(), panicSellStatus() added for emergency liquidation flow; getAIOpinion(id) fetches the most recent AIOpinionLog row (with tool_calls[]) for a position

modules.name: tradesApi
modules.purpose: All trades

modules.name: signalsApi
modules.purpose: Trading signals

modules.name: marketDataApi
modules.purpose: Market data, coin listings

modules.name: settingsApi
modules.purpose: Get/update settings by key

modules.name: monitorApi
modules.purpose: Start/stop trading monitor

modules.name: accountApi
modules.purpose: Balances, aggregate value, portfolio conversion. v2.167.9: getAggregateValue(accountId?) accepts an optional account id and forwards it as the account_id query param so callers can scope the aggregate/market-budget response to a specific account.

modules.name: statusApi
modules.purpose: API connection and monitor status

modules.name: botsApi
modules.purpose: Bot CRUD, strategies, logs, decisions, scanners, indicators, bulk ops; getAll(projectionTimeframe?, accountId?) supports account-scoped bot lists for account-specific views

modules.name: templatesApi
modules.purpose: Bot template management

modules.name: orderHistoryApi
modules.purpose: Order history with filtering and pagination

modules.name: blacklistApi
modules.purpose: Blacklist and category management with AI review

modules.name: aiCredentialsApi
modules.purpose: AI provider credential management

modules.name: aiCostApi
modules.purpose: AI usage and cost aggregates: getSummary(days=7) -> AICostSummary { totals, by_provider: AIProviderCostRow[], by_model: AIModelCostRow[] }; backs the Settings AI cost dashboard

modules.name: autoBuyApi
modules.purpose: Auto-buy BTC settings

modules.name: accountValueApi
modules.purpose: Historical account value snapshots and daily activity markers (trades, deposits, withdrawals)

modules.name: accountValueSummaryApi
modules.purpose: Fast per-account value summary (total USD/BTC, BTC/USD, is_stale, is_refreshing) used by the Dashboard header; GET /accounts/{id}/account-value-summary with optional force_fresh=true; AccountValueSummary type exported from api.ts. Added in v2.164.6.

modules.name: marketDataApi
modules.purpose: Historical market data, coin list, and shared single-product price fetches via getPrice(productId) for market price hooks

modules.name: reportsApi
modules.purpose: Goals CRUD, goal trend data, report schedules, generated reports

modules.name: speculativeBucketApi
modules.purpose: Speculative bucket endpoints: get(accountId) -> SpeculativeBucketInfo (bucket_usd, used_usd, remaining_usd, utilization_pct, open_speculative_positions, speculative_allocation_pct) backing the Dashboard bucket card, and dismissCalibrationAlert({ account_id, dismiss_token }) which posts the signed token from the calibration alert email to stamp the 30-day cooldown. Added in v2.165.0. v2.166.0 adds applyWeightsProposal(accountId, token, proposalId) for the one-click apply link (POST /accounts/{id}/speculative-weights/apply-proposal) and listWeightsProposals(accountId) (GET /accounts/{id}/speculative-weights/proposals) which backs the SpeculativeWeightsHistory table; a new SpeculativeWeightsProposal TypeScript type is exported from api.ts.

state_management.pattern: React Context (app state) + React Query (server state)

react_query.purpose: Centralized data caching with automatic refetch

position: Position (includes coin_category?: string | null populated from blacklist reason prefix)
AIOpinionLog (extended in v2.165.0 with optional doubling_probability_score, speculative_score, speculative_components fields for the catalyst-trade reasoning UI)
bot: Bot (v2.167.10: gained soft_ceiling_effective_max?: number | null — the backend's authoritative effective soft ceiling, used as fallback when the live client estimate is not computable)
account: SpeculativeBucketInfo (bucket_usd, used_usd, remaining_usd, utilization_pct, open_speculative_positions, speculative_allocation_pct) — added v2.165.0
SpeculativeWeightsProposal (id, account_id, status, algorithm, sample_size, baseline_weights, proposed_weights, divergence_pp, created_at, decided_at) — added v2.166.0
reports: ExpenseItem (includes item_type, savings_target_amount, savings_target_date, savings_is_recurring, savings_recurrence_months, assumed_growth_rate_pct, savings_current_balance)

utilities.purpose: Single source of truth for USD currency display. Exports formatUsd(value) which produces '$1,234.56' (grouped thousands, always 2 decimal places, standard locale-aware negatives) via a module-level Intl.NumberFormat instance. Consumed by Dashboard, Portfolio, and PropGuardStatus. Added in v2.168.13.
Fear & Greed coloring, debt calculations, halving countdown
MACD, RSI, Bollinger Bands, EMA, SMA calculations
API base URL configuration from env vars

TTS voice definitions for the article reader, including Microsoft Edge TTS Neural/Multilingual Neural voices, higher-fidelity US multilingual voices, and curated global accented news-reader voices; automatic article cycling skips child voices while CHILD_VOICE_IDS remains available for manual-selection filtering
v2.166.16: loadChartLib() — shared single-flight dynamic import of lightweight-charts; all chart hooks/components that defer the library go through this so it is fetched at most once

buildVisualRows(rows, columns): packs position rows into virtualized 'visual rows' for the deals grid view — group-header rows span the full width (columns=1), card rows are bundled columns-wide; consumed by Positions.tsx grid mode and VirtualizedPositionList.
